case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. DEWITT, DEBZRA et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $4.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DEWITT, DEBZRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT DEWITT, DEBZRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
#5-JUDGE EDWARD FORSTENZER, D. PADILLA, CSR; P. LEE, CLERK- C/C FOR CT TRIAL, ALL PRESENT, ORAL & DOCU EVID PRESENTED, CONDITIONAL JUDGMENT FOR DEFT & AGAINST PLT, IF DEFT COMPLIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED & DECREED THAT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT IF BY 4-21-95, AT 10AM, DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF $1199.21 FOR BACK RENT OWED UP TO & INCLUDE 4-19-95, PLUS $4.50 DAILY RENT THEREAFTER. SAID AMOUNT SHALL PAY TO PLT'S PROPERTY MANAGER, JAMES NOLAN. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, ADJUDGED & DECREED THAT IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS, THEN PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 370 HAIGHT ST, #D SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, $1199.21 FOR BACK RENTS & DAMAGES, LEASE WILL BE FORFEITED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
